reference: I am a singer and guitar player and am having trouble with carpal tunnel syndrome. I have numbness and tingling, and I cannot sleep well because of the pain. I am eighty years old but still active. I would like to ask you what you would do if you were in this situation. Would you suggest the operation or exercising to try to eliminate the problem?
text: I am a singer and guitar player and I'm having trouble with carpal tunnel syndrome. I have numbness and tingling and I cannot sleep well because of the pain. I am 80 years old but still active. I would like to ask you what you would do if you were in this situation. Would you suggest the operation or exercising to try to eliminate the problem?
